description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:latest Docker image with a Maven repository cache at $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.m2/repository and a target/ cache. Define two stages, build and test, and set global variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS='' and MAVEN_OPTS='-Dmaven.repo.local=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.m2/repository -DargLine="-Djdk.net.URLClassPath.disableClassPathURLCheck=true"'. In the build stage add four jobs—build:main, build:neighborhood, build:probe, and build:shop—each setting PROFILE to main, neighborhood, probe-station, and shop respectively and executing the command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -P $PROFILE package". In the test stage add matching four jobs—test:main, test:neighborhood, test:probe, and test:shop—each using the same PROFILE variable and running "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS -P $PROFILE test", while always collecting the artifact path ProbeStationAgent/target/surefire-reports. No special rules or deployment targets are defined, so all jobs run on every pipeline execution.
